# GlobalCodio

> AI Workforce for Global Immigration. Deployed and Managed.

GlobalCodio gives immigration law firms and corporate immigration departments their own AI workforce - built, deployed, and managed end-to-end. Our AI Agents handle case management, client communications, renewals, and business development, while our team runs the entire technology operation. Connected to a global ecosystem of immigration partners, we help your team cut costs and grow revenue - without ever managing technology again.

## Three Pillars

- AI Agents: autonomous workers for case management, comms, renewals, and business development
- Managed Technology Operations: deploy, configure, monitor, and optimize the agent ecosystem
- Global Immigration Ecosystem: translators, document authentication, foreign attorneys, medical exams, couriers

## AI Agents

- Intake Agent: collects client info, validates documents, opens cases
- Document Agent: extracts data from passports, visas, foreign records, translates
- Forms Agent: auto-fills I-130, I-485, N-400, H-1B, EB-5, and other USCIS forms
- Deadline Agent: tracks every case deadline, alerts on expirations
- Client Comms Agent: proactively updates clients, answers FAQs, sends reminders
- Renewal Agent: surfaces renewal opportunities from existing client data
- BD Agent: runs business development campaigns, qualifies leads
- Ecosystem Agent: coordinates with translators, courier services, foreign agents

## Audiences

- Immigration law firms (solo, mid-size, enterprise)
- Corporate immigration departments and mobility teams

## Value Levers

Cost savings from reduced case prep and AI-powered support. Revenue growth from renewal detection and BD automation - each tied to measurable agent outcomes. Typical year-one ROI: 3x.

## Trust & Compliance

Security and compliance standards immigration firms evaluate during vendor due diligence:

- SOC 2 Type II and ISO 27001 security attestation
- GDPR, UK GDPR, and CCPA/CPRA privacy controls
- HIPAA-ready safeguards for immigration medical records
- AES-256 encryption at rest and TLS 1.3 in transit
- ABA-aligned AI governance with attorney supervision
- Attorney-client privilege safeguards and no training on client data
- Enterprise SSO, MFA, and role-based access control
- Standard DPA and security documentation available on request
